title: Ancient Texts Library
subtitle: A Scholarly Study of Sacred & Ancient Writings

texts.name: Genesis
texts.description: Creation, patriarchs, and the origins of Israel

texts.name: Exodus
texts.description: Liberation from Egypt, Sinai covenant, and the tabernacle

texts.name: Leviticus
texts.description: Holiness, sacrifice, and the cosmic architecture of atonement

texts.name: Numbers
texts.description: Wilderness journey — rebellion, Nephilim report, bronze serpent, and Balaam's prophecy

texts.name: Deuteronomy
texts.description: Moses' final addresses — the Shema, the Song, and the divine council worldview

texts.name: Joshua
texts.description: Conquest of Canaan — divine warfare, Jericho, the Anakim, and covenant renewal at Shechem

texts.name: Judges
texts.description: Cycles of apostasy, oppression, and deliverance — the Nephilim question at Bashan, divine warfare, and Israel's descent

texts.name: Ruth
texts.description: The kinsman-redeemer — covenant loyalty, levirate law, and the Davidic lineage through a Moabite woman

texts.name: 1 Samuel
texts.description: From judges to kings — Samuel, Saul's rise and fall, David's anointing, and the Ark's journey

texts.name: 2 Samuel
texts.description: David's kingdom — the Davidic covenant, Bathsheba, Absalom's rebellion, and the threshing floor

texts.name: 1 Kings
texts.description: Solomon's glory and the divided kingdom — the Temple, Elijah, and the contest at Carmel

texts.name: 2 Kings
texts.description: Elisha, the fall of Israel, Josiah's reform, and the Babylonian exile

texts.name: Psalms
texts.description: Israel's hymnbook — divine council enthronement psalms, messianic prophecy, lament, and praise

texts.name: Isaiah
texts.description: The Fifth Gospel — Servant Songs, cosmic judgment, new creation, and the most quoted OT prophet

texts.name: Daniel
texts.description: Apocalyptic visions — Son of Man, four kingdoms, 70 weeks, divine council, and territorial spirits

texts.name: Matthew
texts.description: The Jewish Messiah — fulfillment of prophecy, kingdom of heaven, and the Great Commission

texts.name: Mark
texts.description: The Suffering Servant — urgency, exorcism, the messianic secret, and the cross

texts.name: Luke
texts.description: The Son of Man — universal salvation, the poor, women, and the journey to Jerusalem

texts.name: John
texts.description: The Divine Word — Logos theology, I AM statements, Psalm 82 defense, and the Farewell Discourse

texts.name: Acts
texts.description: The Spirit's mission — Pentecost as Babel reversal, the church reclaiming the nations

texts.name: Romans
texts.description: The cosmic gospel — justification, Israel's mystery, cosmic groaning, and the defeat of all powers

texts.name: 1 Corinthians
texts.description: Church order — judging angels, head coverings and the Watchers, resurrection body, and cosmic wisdom

texts.name: 2 Corinthians
texts.description: Apostolic suffering — the god of this age, new creation, and the ministry of reconciliation

texts.name: Galatians
texts.description: Freedom in Christ — law given through angels, the seed of Abraham, and the new creation

texts.name: Ephesians
texts.description: The cosmic church — principalities, powers, spiritual warfare, and the mystery revealed to the heavenly rulers

texts.name: Philippians
texts.description: Joy in chains — the Christ hymn, kenosis, and every knee bowing in heaven, earth, and under the earth

texts.name: Colossians
texts.description: Christ supreme — firstborn over all creation, thrones/dominions/rulers disarmed, the cosmic reconciliation

texts.name: 1 Thessalonians
texts.description: The coming Lord — the dead in Christ, the day of the Lord, and the archangel's call

texts.name: 2 Thessalonians
texts.description: The man of lawlessness — the restrainer, the mystery of iniquity, and final judgment

texts.name: 1 Timothy
texts.description: Church governance — doctrines of demons, the mystery of godliness, and the good fight

texts.name: 2 Timothy
texts.description: Final charge — the inspired Scripture, the crown of righteousness, and the last days

texts.name: Titus
texts.description: Order in Crete — sound doctrine, the grace of God, and renewal by the Holy Spirit

texts.name: Philemon
texts.description: A slave becomes a brother — reconciliation, intercession, and the new social order in Christ

texts.name: Hebrews
texts.description: Christ supreme — Psalm 110 Melchizedek, Deut 32:43 angel worship, the heavenly tabernacle, and the better covenant

texts.name: James
texts.description: Faith in action — wisdom from above, the tongue, and the prayer of faith

texts.name: 1 Peter
texts.description: Suffering and glory — the spirits in prison, the victory proclamation, and the royal priesthood

texts.name: 2 Peter
texts.description: The angels who sinned — Tartarus, the flood, the day of the Lord, and the new heavens

texts.name: 1 John
texts.description: Light and darkness — the antichrist spirit, the children of God vs the children of the devil

texts.name: 2 John
texts.description: Truth and love — warning against deceivers who deny the incarnation

texts.name: 3 John
texts.description: Hospitality and authority — Diotrephes, Demetrius, and faithful church leadership

texts.name: Jude
texts.description: The angels who abandoned their domain — 1 Enoch quoted, the Watchers, and Michael vs the devil

texts.name: Revelation
texts.description: The cosmic finale — divine council throne room, the Lamb, cosmic warfare, Babylon, and the new creation

texts.name: 1 Enoch
texts.description: The Watchers, Son of Man, cosmic order, and apocalyptic visions — 4Q201-212 (Aramaic fragments)

texts.name: Book of Giants
texts.description: Fragments telling the story of the Nephilim giants from Qumran

texts.name: Jubilees
texts.description: Retelling of Genesis-Exodus with Mastema, solar calendar, and Watcher traditions

texts.name: Book of Jasher
texts.description: Extended patriarchal narratives referenced in Joshua 10:13 and 2 Samuel 1:18

texts.name: Genesis Apocryphon
texts.description: Expanded Genesis narratives from Qumran — Lamech, Noah, Abraham

texts.name: DSS Sectarian Texts
texts.description: Community Rule, War Scroll, Temple Scroll, Damascus Document, Hodayot

texts.name: Josephus
texts.description: Historical works of Titus Flavius Josephus — Jewish War, Antiquities, Against Apion

texts.name: The Heavenly Court
texts.description: A grammatical & theological deep dive into the divine council worldview

texts.name: Job
texts.description: Suffering, the divine council, cosmic justice, and YHWH's theophany from the whirlwind

texts.name: Proverbs
texts.description: Wisdom personified, fear of YHWH, and practical instruction for covenant life

texts.name: Ecclesiastes
texts.description: Life under the sun — hebel, wisdom's limits, and the fear of God as the whole duty of man

texts.name: Song of Solomon
texts.description: Love poetry celebrating covenant love between beloved and lover — read as both literal and typological

texts.name: Jeremiah
texts.description: The weeping prophet — judgment on Judah, the new covenant promise, and the fall of Jerusalem

texts.name: Ezekiel
texts.description: Throne visions, cherubim, the divine glory departing and returning, and the new temple

texts.name: Lamentations
texts.description: Acrostic poems of grief over Jerusalem's fall — covenant curses fulfilled, hope in YHWH's faithfulness

texts.name: 1 Chronicles
texts.description: Israel's genealogies and David's reign — temple preparations and the Davidic covenant

texts.name: 2 Chronicles
texts.description: Solomon's temple, the divided kingdom, reform and apostasy, exile and the decree of Cyrus

texts.name: Ezra
texts.description: Return from Babylon, temple rebuilding, and covenant renewal under Persian rule

texts.name: Nehemiah
texts.description: Rebuilding Jerusalem's walls, Ezra's Torah reading, and covenant renewal in the restored community

texts.name: Esther
texts.description: Divine providence in the Persian court — Haman's plot, Esther's courage, and the feast of Purim

texts.name: Hosea
texts.description: Covenant unfaithfulness as spiritual adultery — judgment, exile, and promised restoration

texts.name: Joel
texts.description: The Day of YHWH — locust plague, call to repentance, and the outpouring of the Spirit

texts.name: Amos
texts.description: Social justice, divine judgment on the nations, and cosmic visions of Israel's fate

texts.name: Obadiah
texts.description: Oracle against Edom — judgment on Esau's descendants and the Day of YHWH

texts.name: Jonah
texts.description: The reluctant prophet — divine mercy extended beyond Israel to Nineveh

texts.name: Micah
texts.description: Justice, the Bethlehem prophecy, covenant lawsuit, and hope for the remnant

texts.name: Nahum
texts.description: The fall of Nineveh — YHWH as divine warrior executing judgment on Assyria

texts.name: Habakkuk
texts.description: Theodicy dialogue with YHWH — 'the righteous shall live by faith' and the divine warrior theophany

texts.name: Zephaniah
texts.description: The great Day of YHWH — cosmic judgment, purification, and the humble remnant

texts.name: Haggai
texts.description: Rebuilding the temple — the glory of the latter house will surpass the former

texts.name: Zechariah
texts.description: Night visions, the divine council, messianic prophecy, and the pierced one of Zechariah 12

texts.name: Malachi
texts.description: Covenant faithfulness, the coming messenger, tithes, and the Elijah prophecy

Elijah
themes: Contest at Carmel — Baal vs YHWH

themes: World lies in the evil one

eras.name: Testing the Spirits & Overcoming the World
themes: The whole world in the evil one

eras.name: Covenant & Mercy
themes: Who is a God like you?
